ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( /* Check if at least one field has a value */ OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Member_One_Ownership_Percentage__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Member_Two_Ownership_Percentage__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Member_3_Ownership__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Member_4_Ownership__c)) ),
/* Check if the sum is NOT equal to 100% (1.0) */ ROUND( BLANKVALUE(Member_One_Ownership_Percentage__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Member_Two_Ownership_Percentage__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Member_3_Ownership__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Member_4_Ownership__c, 0) , 2) <> 1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The total ownership of Entity members must equal exactly 100%. Please review and adjust the member ownership percentage fields.
